_publications._publicationTitle: Generation of a zebrafish neurofibromatosis model via inducible knockout of nf2a/b.
_publications._context: Transgenic lines used in this study were the ABWT (Zebrafish International Resource Center), Tg(HOTCre:Cas9) (a kind gift from Dr Wenbiao Chen, Vanderbilt University School of Medicine, Nashville, TN, USA), Tg(−7.2kb-sox10:mRFP) and Tg(U6x:nf2a/b-4sgRNA) (generated at the Bronner laboratory, Caltech) lines.
